tasks.name: Setup WordNet and Token Verification
tasks.description: Download NLTK WordNet data and verify that all selected parent-child hierarchy tokens and control-pair tokens are single tokens in both GPT-2 and Pythia tokenizers.

tasks.name: Pilot: Semantic-Hierarchy Probe Pipeline
tasks.description: Run the custom semantic-hierarchy absorption pipeline on 2 SAEs (MatryoshkaBatchTopK_trainer_0 and TopK_trainer_0) using 3 WordNet hierarchies and 2 control pairs. Validate probe quality, numerical stability, and expected ordering.

pilot.pass_criteria: All hierarchies return finite absorption scores; probe AUROC > 0.6 for all tested hierarchies; Matryoshka semantic absorption < TopK semantic absorption; semantic-hierarchy score > non-hierarchy control score for at least 1 of 2 SAEs

visualizations.description: Pilot semantic vs control absorption per SAE

tasks.name: First-Letter Absorption on Pythia-160M SAEs
tasks.description: Run the official SAEBench absorption evaluator on all 8 Pythia-160M SAE configurations (7 families + random-SAE control). Record mean_full_absorption_score and mean_absorption_fraction_score.

tasks.name: Semantic-Hierarchy Absorption on Pythia-160M SAEs
tasks.description: Run the custom semantic-hierarchy absorption pipeline on all 8 Pythia-160M SAE configurations using 10 WordNet hierarchies. Compute mean absorption score per SAE and per-hierarchy breakdown.

tasks.name: Non-Hierarchy Control Absorption on Pythia-160M SAEs
tasks.description: Run the custom absorption pipeline on 10 non-hierarchical correlated pairs for all 8 Pythia-160M SAE configurations. Compute mean control absorption score per SAE.

visualizations.description: Semantic-hierarchy vs non-hierarchy control per architecture

tasks.name: Robustness Analysis: Varying tau_fs
tasks.description: Re-run semantic-hierarchy and non-hierarchy absorption at tau_fs = 0.01 and tau_fs = 0.05 for all 8 SAEs. Compute Pearson correlation between first-letter and semantic-hierarchy absorption at each threshold.

tasks.name: Replication: Semantic-Hierarchy on GPT-2 Small
tasks.description: Run the semantic-hierarchy and non-hierarchy absorption pipelines on GPT-2 small (layer 8, resid_pre) using 2-3 representative SAEs (Standard and TopK). Test whether the correlation pattern replicates across models.

visualizations.description: GPT-2 vs Pythia semantic-hierarchy absorption comparison

tasks.name: Statistical Analysis and Figure Generation
tasks.description: Compute Pearson correlations with bootstrap CIs, paired t-tests, and generate all figures and tables for the paper. Save analysis notebook and final summary JSON.

visualizations.description: Figure 2: First-letter vs semantic-hierarchy absorption with regression line
Figure 3: Architecture comparison across three conditions
